india_trends.title: Stock market today: Nifty 50, Sensex end higher but off day’s highs on profit booking; FMCG stocks shine
india_trends.summary: On April 29, the Indian stock market ended positively but retreated from highs as investors took profits. The Nifty 50 closed at 24,164, up 0.70%, while the Sensex gained 0.82% to finish at 77,520, reflecting mixed trends in broader markets.

india_trends.title: Adani Power Q4 Results 2026: Net profit rises 64% to ₹4,271.40 crore; revenue flat
india_trends.summary: Adani Power reported a consolidated net profit increase of over 64% to ₹4,271.40 crore for Q4FY26, compared to ₹2,599.23 crore last year. However, revenue from operations showed a slight decrease at ₹14,223.09 crore against ₹14,237.40 crore from the previous March quarter.

india_trends.summary: Vedanta Q4 results 2026: Metals and mining conglomerate Vedanta on Wednesday, 29 April, reported its best-ever profit after tax (PAT) and revenue for the January-March quarter of the financial year 2026 (Q4FY26).

india_trends.title: Silver futures decline Rs 1,137 to Rs 2.36 lakh/kg as oil rally weighs on bullion demand
india_trends.summary: Silver prices declined by Rs 1,137 to Rs 2.36 lakh per kilogram in futures trade on Wednesday as traders trimmed positions amid concerns over elevated crude oil rates and strengthening of the US dollar.

india_trends.title: Indian Bank Q4 Results: Standalone profit grows 5% YoY to Rs 3,103 crore; Rs 18.25/share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Indian Bank reported a standalone net profit of Rs 3,103 crore for the March-ended quarter, up 5% from Rs 2,956 crore a year ago. Net interest income (NII) rose 11% to Rs 7,110 crore in Q4FY26, compared with Rs 6,389.34 crore in the corresponding quarter of the previous financial year.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | European markets dip as investors eye earnings, Iran conflict continues to weigh
india_trends.summary: European shares dipped on Wednesday, as investors turned ​their focus to a packed day ​of corporate earnings, while a continuing U.S.-Iran impasse also kept risk sentiment in ​check.

india_trends.summary: Vedanta Q4 Results: The company's total revenues from operations in Q4FY26 stood at Rs 24,609 crore, rising 47% YoY

india_trends.title: 350% rally in five years! Multibagger small-cap stock hits upper circuit after promoters plan to raise stake
india_trends.summary: AVI Polymers' stock surged to ₹19.02 after promoters announced plans to increase their stake by 5% following a significant financial turnaround, including a 4,854x revenue increase and a debt-free status, positioning the company for long-term growth.

india_trends.title: Indian Bank Q4 Results: Net profit rises 5% YoY to ₹3,103 crore, asset quality improves; declares ₹18.25 dividend
india_trends.summary: Indian Bank reported a net profit of ₹3,103 crore for the March quarter, a 5% increase from the previous year. Net interest income surged 11.28% to ₹7,110 crore compared to ₹6,389 crore last year.
